title: anoectochilus japonicus
intro: Anoectochilus japonicus, also known as the Japanese orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is primarily used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion, due to its high content of flavonoids and alkaloids. Aloe vera-like gel can be extracted from the plant, which is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and poultices.
